languages.text: "Сержант Янур Батошски, тебе руководить тактической операцией. Твой боевой опыт больше моего, а Устав велит грамотно распределять командование в поле".
"Sergeant Janur Batoshski, you're in charge of the tactical operation. Your combat experience is greater than mine, and the Handbook dictates that command in the field be delegated wisely."
languages.original_text: "Сержант Янур Батошски, тебе руководить тактической операцией. Твой боевой опыт больше моего, а Устав велит грамотно распределять командование в поле".

traits.locale_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, you're in charge of the tactical operation. Your combat experience is greater than mine, and the Code dictates that command in the field be delegated wisely."
"Sergeant Janur Batoshski, you're in charge of the tactical operation. Your combat experience is greater than mine, and the Code dictates that command in the field be delegated wisely."
"Sergeant Janur, you're in charge of the tactical operation. Your combat experience is greater than mine — I'm ready to follow orders."
"Sergeant Janur Batoshski, you're in charge of the tactical operation. Your combat experience is greater than mine, and the Code dictates that command in the field be delegated wisely."
"Sergeant Janur Batoshski, you're in charge of the tactical operation. Your combat experience is greater than mine, and the Code dictates that command in the field be delegated wisely."

languages.text: 「ジャヌール中尉、あなたは戦術作戦の指揮を執ります。あなたの戦闘経験は私より優れています。私は命令に従う準備ができています」
languages.original_text: "Sergeant Janur, you're in charge of the tactical operation. Your combat experience is greater than mine — I'm ready to follow orders."

traits.locale_text: 「ジャンヌ中尉、あなたは戦術作戦の指揮を執ります。あなたの戦闘経験は私より優れています。私は命令に従う準備ができています。」

languages.text: "Çavuş Janur Batoshski, taktik operasyonun komutası sende. Çatışma deneyimin benimkinden fazla. El Kitabı, sahada komutanın akla yatkın şekilde devredilmesini emreder."
languages.original_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, you're in charge of the tactical operation. Your combat experience is greater than mine, and the Handbook dictates that command in the field be delegated wisely."

traits.locale_text: "Çavuş Janur Batoshski, taktik operasyonun komutası sende. Çatışma deneyimin benimkinden fazla. El Kitabı, sahada komutanın akla yatkın şekilde devredilmesini emreder."

languages.text: «Sargento Janur Batoshski, queda al cargo de la operación táctica. Posee más experiencia en combate que yo y el manual indica que el mando sobre el terreno debe delegarse con sabiduría».
languages.original_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, you're in charge of the tactical operation. Your combat experience is greater than mine, and the Handbook dictates that command in the field be delegated wisely."

traits.locale_text: «Sargento Janur Batoshski, queda al cargo de la operación táctica. Posee más experiencia en combate que yo y el manual indica que el mando sobre el terreno debe delegarse con sabiduría».

languages.text: “雅努尔·巴托什斯基军士，战术行动由你负责。你的战斗经验比我丰富，《手册》也规定，应当合理分配战场指挥权。”
languages.original_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, you're in charge of the tactical operation. Your combat experience is greater than mine, and the Handbook dictates that command in the field be delegated wisely."

traits.locale_text: “雅努尔·巴托什斯基军士，战术行动由你负责。你的战斗经验比我丰富，《手册》也规定，应当合理分配战场指挥权。”

languages.text: « Sergent Janur Batoshski, vous allez prendre la tête de l'opération tactique. Votre expérience au combat surpasse la mienne, et le Manuel dicte que le commandement sur le terrain soit délégué judicieusement. »
languages.original_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, you're in charge of the tactical operation. Your combat experience is greater than mine, and the Handbook dictates that command in the field be delegated wisely."

traits.locale_text: « Sergent Janur Batoshski, vous allez prendre la tête de l'opération tactique. Votre expérience au combat surpasse la mienne, et le Manuel dicte que le commandement sur le terrain soit délégué judicieusement. »

languages.text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, Ihr seid für die taktische Operation verantwortlich. Ihr habt eine größere Kampferfahrung als ich, und das Handbuch verlangt die weise Übertragung des Feldkommandos."
languages.original_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, you're in charge of the tactical operation. Your combat experience is greater than mine, and the Handbook dictates that command in the field be delegated wisely."

traits.locale_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, Ihr seid für die taktische Operation verantwortlich. Ihr habt eine größere Kampferfahrung als ich, und das Handbuch verlangt die weise Übertragung des Feldkommandos."
